ddls:
CREATE TABLE "oceanographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor location */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time (UTC) when the data was recorded */,
  "wave_height_ft" REAL /* Wave height in feet */,
  "peak_period_s" REAL /* Peak period in seconds */,
  "peak_direction_deg" INTEGER /* Peak direction in degrees */,
  "average_wave_period_s" REAL /* Average wave period in seconds */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Water temperature in Celsius */,
  "salinity_ppt" REAL /* Salinity in parts per thousand */,
  "turbidity_ntu" REAL /* Turbidity in nephelometric turbidity units */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oceanographic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "depth_ft" REAL /* Depth of the sensor location in feet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor location */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was deployed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES oceanographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data record
Date and time (UTC) when the data was recorded
Flag indicating the quality of the data
Unique identifier for each sensor location
Depth of the sensor location in feet
Date when the sensor was deployed
Unique identifier for each access log entry
